specs.display_features: Shows IP address, CPU status, storage status
specs.microsd_access: Can be ejected by pushing from same port
specs.heat_management: Natural aluminum heat conductivity with controllable fan
specs.cable_management: All ports on one side for neat organization
specs.pi4_processor: Broadcom BCM2711, 1.8 GHz quad-core 64-bit Arm Cortex-A72
specs.pi4_gpu: VideoCore VI, OpenGL ES 3.1, 4Kp60 H.265 decode
specs.pi4_display_outputs: 2× micro-HDMI (4Kp60 + 4Kp60 simultaneous), MIPI DSI, MIPI CSI
specs.pi4_supported_os: Raspberry Pi OS (32-bit and 64-bit), Ubuntu, and others
specs.display_shows: IP address, CPU status, storage status
specs.thermal_management: Passive aluminum heat conduction + active software-controllable fan

snapshot.description: 4-bay Pi NAS enclosure for Raspberry Pi 4 with SATA storage support, full-size HDMI output, and integrated power management. Supports 2.5" SATA SSDs/HDDs and optional 3.5" drives with adapter.
